verdict.answer_first: A states the core plan immediately: “verify → persist raw → ack fast → process async... with a reconciliation job”; B also starts well but adds more setup before the concrete build order.
verdict.decisiveness: A commits to one clear pattern: “The reliable pattern is...” and stays on that path; B is also decisive but includes more surrounding options like “DB-backed queue... Redis, Kafka.”
verdict.actionability: B is easiest to execute immediately because it includes an explicit “Suggested build order” with steps 1–5, though A is more concise.
